Description: Call into action your warp loader, and bulldoze your way through life.
Description{Enhanced}: Created for the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this six-wheeled construction machina can traverse the roughest terrain with ease, and boasts ample power for clearing away obstacles with its front-facing blade. It is highly regarded among the Loporrits for its combination of utility and mobility.
Tooltip:
You've certainly proven you
are not one to let obstacles
stand in your path.
   - Grynewyda

Description: Summon forth your interstellar dhalmel, and ride it boldly where no dhalmel has gone before.
Description{Enhanced}: This dhalmel was a subject in adaptability testing for life-forms native to Etheirys. As their kind is found in multifarious lands, from arid wastes to floating isles, they are believed to be highly adaptable, and it is hoped that they will also thrive in interstellar environments.
Tooltip:
If some ill misfortune befalls you─
say, you're trampled by the dhalmels─
know that your remains will not go to waste.
   - Atelloune

Description: Deploy your cosmoboard, and shred up the cosmos (figuratively) wherever you go.
Description{Enhanced}: Originally used to convey workers around Sinus Ardorum as part of the Cosmoliner network, this hovering board has undergone modification to incorporate a crystal power source. The result is a personal mode of transportation that is unbound to set routes, and looks radical besides.
Tooltip:
How in the world do they
make it hover like that?
   - Anxious Girl
